# GitHub Actions Workflows

CI workflows for the Maayar documentation repository.

---

## Workflows

| Workflow | Trigger | Purpose |
|----------|---------|---------|
| [docs-lint.yml](./docs-lint.yml) | Push/PR to `main` | Validate documentation structure and check for sensitive files |

---

## Future Workflows

| Workflow | Purpose | Status |
|----------|---------|--------|
| Link checker | Validate all markdown links resolve | Planned |
| Mermaid validator | Verify Mermaid diagram syntax | Planned |
| Spell checker | Documentation spelling validation | Planned |
